descriptions.2: Lacks Discipline — Works only when instructed. No initiative.
descriptions.3: Motivated but Directionless — Wants to help but lacks focus.

descriptions.4: Careless and Inconsistent — Some output but unreliable.
descriptions.5: Consistent Performer — Reliable execution. Does assigned work.
descriptions.6: Reliable and Productive — High trust executor. Supervisor delegates confidently.

descriptions.7: Problem Identifier — Notices issues others missed. Expands scope.
descriptions.8: Problem Solver — Builds practical solutions. Creates systems/processes.
descriptions.9: Innovative and Experimental — Experiments. Builds new tools/MVPs.
descriptions.10: Exceptional Performer — Replicable organizational impact. Others learn from them.

six_vs_seven.six: Executes assigned work reliably. 'He does everything I give him.'
six_vs_seven.seven: Identifies problems independently. 'She noticed rejection spikes on Mondays and started tracking why.'
